title: [v4.2] Sigstore sign
body:
This is a backport of #15108 to the 4.2 branch.

It vendors an unreleased version of c/common to be consistent with the original PR; we will get a released c/common 0.49.1 when vendoring the future Buildah release.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Added the ability to create sigstore signatures in `podman push` and `podman manifest push`.
Added an option to read image signing passphrase from a file.
```

The tip of the 4.2 branch is failing the same way: https://github.com/containers/podman/runs/7544230196
@mtrmac we can wave that with the label.  For the e2e tests to pass you need to cherry-pick https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/15139/commits/3a05ddfb731d411678522ea38822e059f6e85515.

I am going to merge this, but we need to pull in the released version of containers/common and buildah and then RC3 should be ready.

/lgtm
